stemHtml: You are dumping fuel in order to reduce your Landing weight. However, the automatic jettison valve does not close. Is this situation still safe?

options.a: No, all the fuel will be removed from the tanks.
options.b: Yes, because the system must be designed in a way that will leave enough fuel for approach and landing and the pilots can close the valve manually.
options.c: Yes, because the system has two valves, and if one fails, the other will close automatically.
options.d: Yes. The aircraft will still be within safe weight and balance limits, regardless of the fuel dumped.
